goal: forall(x0: Complex) { complex_modulus(x0) = 0 implies x0 = Complex.0 }
proof: let w0: Complex satisfy { complex_modulus(w0) = 0 and Complex.0 != w0 }
function(x0: Complex) { complex_modulus(x0) = 0 = (x0 = Complex.0) }(w0)
function(x0: Bool) { not (x0 and not x0) }(Complex.0 = w0)
let w0: Complex satisfy { complex_modulus(-w0) != complex_modulus(w0) }
function(x0: Complex) { complex_modulus(-x0) = complex_modulus(x0) }(w0)

goal: forall(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { complex_modulus(x0 + x1) <= complex_modulus(x0) + complex_modulus(x1) }
proof: let w0: Complex satisfy { exists(k0: Complex) { not complex_modulus(w0 + k0) <= complex_modulus(w0) + complex_modulus(k0) } }
let w1: Complex satisfy { not complex_modulus(w0 + w1) <= complex_modulus(w0) + complex_modulus(w1) }
let w2: Complex satisfy { not complex_modulus(w0 + w2) <= complex_modulus(w0) + complex_modulus(w2) }
function(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { complex_modulus(x0 + x1) <= complex_modulus(x0) + complex_modulus(x1) }(w0, w2)
function(x0: Complex) { x0.norm = complex_modulus(x0) }(z)
function(x0: Complex) { x0.norm = complex_modulus(x0) }(Complex.0)
function(x0: Complex) { x0.norm = complex_modulus(x0) }(-z)
function(x0: Complex) { x0.norm = complex_modulus(x0) }(z)
(-z).norm = complex_modulus(z)
(-z).norm != complex_modulus(z)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T1](lib(functions).identity_fn[T1], x0, x1) = x0(x1) }[Real, Real -> Bool](Real.lte, complex_modulus(z + w))
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T1](lib(functions).identity_fn[T1], x0, x1) = x0(x1) }[Real, Real -> Bool](Real.lte, (z + w).norm)
function(x0: Real -> Bool, x1: Real) { lib(real.real_set).flip(lib(real.real_set).flip(x0), x1) = x0(x1) }(complex_modulus(z + w).lte, complex_modulus(z) + complex_modulus(w))
function(x0: Real -> Bool, x1: Real) { lib(real.real_set).flip(lib(real.real_set).flip(x0), x1) = x0(x1) }((z + w).norm.lte, z.norm + w.norm)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 = lib(real.real_base).add(x0, x1) }(complex_modulus(z), complex_modulus(w))
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 = lib(real.real_base).add(x0, x1) }(z.norm, w.norm)
function(x0: Complex) { x0.norm = complex_modulus(x0) }(w)
function(x0: Complex) { x0.norm = complex_modulus(x0) }(z)
function(x0: Complex) { x0.norm = complex_modulus(x0) }(z + w)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(complex_modulus(z), complex_modulus(w))
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(z.norm, w.norm)
function(x0: Complex) { x0.norm = complex_modulus(x0) }(z * w)
function(x0: Complex) { x0.norm = complex_modulus(x0) }(z)
function(x0: Complex) { x0.norm = complex_modulus(x0) }(w)

goal: forall(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { (x0 * x1).norm = x0.norm * x1.norm }
proof: let w0: Complex satisfy { exists(k0: Complex) { (w0 * k0).norm != w0.norm * k0.norm } }
let w1: Complex satisfy { (w0 * w1).norm != w0.norm * w1.norm }
let w2: Complex satisfy { (w0 * w2).norm != w0.norm * w2.norm }
function(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { x0.norm * x1.norm = (x0 * x1).norm }(w0, w2)
function(x0: Complex) { x0.norm = complex_modulus(x0) }(Complex.from_real(a))

goal: complex_real_smul(a, z) = Complex.new(a * z.re, a * z.im)
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Complex) { Complex.new(x0 * x1.re, x0 * x1.im) = complex_real_smul(x0, x1) }(a, z)

goal: z * Complex.from_real(a) = Complex.new(z.re * a, z.im * a)

proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(a, z.re)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(a, z.im)

goal: Complex.new(z.re * a, z.im * a) = Complex.new(a * z.re, a * z.im)

proof: function(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(z, Complex.from_real(a))
z * Complex.from_real(a) != Complex.from_real(a) * z
function(x0: Real) { x0.norm = lib(real_normed).real_norm(x0) }(a)
